description: Replace text in files (find-and-replace). Supports three modes: (1) 'files' array for multi-file precise replace, (2) 'file_pattern' glob for batch replace, (3) 'path' for single-file (legacy). Priority: files > file_pattern > path. Returns: number of replacements made. When 'old' is empty: prepends 'new' at the beginning of each file. When 'new' is empty: deletes all occurrences of 'old'. With regex: use $1, $2 in 'new' to reference capture groups. Use dry_run=true to preview changes. Example (files array): {"files": [{"path": "a.go", "old": "fmt.Println", "new": "log.Println"}], "dry_run": true}. Example (multi): {"file_pattern": "*.go", "old": "fmt.Println", "new": "log.Println", "dry_run": true}. Example (single): {"path": "main.go", "old": "fmt.Println", "new": "log.Println"}
name: replace

old.description: 要替换的文本（可选，继承顶层 old）

new.description: 替换为的文本（可选，继承顶层 new）

regex.description: 是否 regex（可选，继承顶层 regex）

files.description: 多文件替换数组。每项有 path，可选 old/new/regex（继承顶层值）。优先级高于 file_pattern 和 path。

file_pattern.description: Glob pattern for batch multi-file replace (e.g. '*.go', 'src/**/*.js')

old.description: Text to search for. If empty, 'new' is prepended at the start of each file.

new.description: Replacement text. If empty, all matches of 'old' are deleted. With regex, use $1/$2 for capture groups.

regex.description: If true, treat 'old' as a regex pattern; 'new' can use $1, $2 etc. for capture groups. Default: false (literal match).

dry_run.description: If true, preview replacements without actually modifying files.
